languages.text: "Врачевание людей — это ваша вотчина. С какой стати мне решать ваши проблемы за вас?"

traits.locale_text: "Хирургеон, врачевание людей — это ваша вотчина. С какой стати мне решать ваши проблемы за вас?".

languages.text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"
languages.original_text: "Врачевание людей — это ваша вотчина. С какой стати мне решать ваши проблемы за вас?"

traits.locale_text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"
"Chirurgeon, healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"
"Chirurgeon, healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"
"Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

languages.text: 「外科医、人の治療はあなたの領域。なぜ私があなたの問題を解決する必要があるのか？」
languages.original_text: "Chirurgeon, healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

languages.text: "İnsanları iyileştirmek senin alanın. Sorunlarını neden ben çözeyim?"
languages.original_text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

traits.locale_text: "İnsanları iyileştirmek senin alanın. Sorunlarını neden ben çözeyim?"

languages.text: “救死扶伤是你们的职责，为什么还要我来解决你们的问题？”
languages.original_text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

traits.locale_text: “救死扶伤是你们的职责，为什么还要我来解决你们的问题？”

languages.text: "Heilung ist Eure Domäne. Warum sollte ich Eure Probleme lösen?"
languages.original_text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

traits.locale_text: "Heilung ist Eure Domäne. Warum sollte ich Eure Probleme lösen?"

languages.text: « La prise en charge des malades est votre responsabilité. Pourquoi devrais-je régler vos problèmes à votre place ? »
languages.original_text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

traits.locale_text: « La prise en charge des malades est votre responsabilité. Pourquoi devrais-je régler vos problèmes à votre place ? »

languages.text: «Tratar a la gente es su labor. ¿Por qué debería resolver yo sus problemas?».
languages.original_text: "Healing people is your domain. Why should I solve your problems for you?"

traits.locale_text: «Tratar a la gente es su labor. ¿Por qué debería resolver yo sus problemas?».
